results.title: Stock Market Today (Apr. 29, 2026): Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta to report after bell after Fed shock, Trump Iran announcement
Stock Market Today (LIVE): Big Tech's Moment of Truth; Fed Pauses Amid Historic Rift
Stock Market Today, April 29: SoFi Technologies Drops After Flat Full Year Guidance
Stock Market Today, April 28: Tech Stocks Slide on OpenAI-Fueled Jitters

summary: Dow fell 280pts (-0.57%) to 48,861 for fifth straight losing day. S&P 500 down 0.04% to 7,135.95. Nasdaq flat at 24,673. Fed held rates steady (8-4 historic dissent). Oil rallying on U.S. blockade of Iranian ports. Mag7 earnings awaited (GOOGL, MSFT, AMZN, META). Seagate +18%, NXP +26%, SoFi -15.4%, Robinhood -10%.
